name: logmaster
description: LogMaster - Sistema de Control de Acceso de Visitantes

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings concurrently "pnpm run server" "pnpm run client"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings concurrently "pnpm run server" "pnpm run client"
scripts.test: pnpm run test:server && pnpm run test:client
scripts.build: pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:server
